concept: Players manage a pancake house, handling customer orders through a multi-stage process: taking orders at the Order Station, cooking pancakes on a griddle at the Grill Station, adding toppings and syrups at the Build Station, and serving. The game scores players on the accuracy of cooking (flipping at the right time), ingredient placement, and overall presentation, directly influencing tips and daily earnings.
name: Papa's Pancakeria To Go!
